title: Lastrea calva
taxonomy: Lastrea calva is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the wood ferns. It belongs to the genus Lastrea, which is a group of ferns that are typically found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Lastrea calva is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. This fern is native to various parts of the world, including Asia and Africa, and is often found growing in shaded, humid environments. The classification of Lastrea calva reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a distinct species within the larger family of ferns.
